---
id: events
title: "Subscribe to VRM events via SSE."
description: "Events include: drag-start, drag, drag-end, pointer-press, pointer-click,"
sidebar_label: "Subscribe to VRM events via SSE."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Subscribe to VRM events via SSE."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity}/events"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Events include: drag-start, drag, drag-end, pointer-press, pointer-click,
pointer-move, pointer-release, pointer-over, pointer-out, pointer-cancel,
state-change, expression-change, vrma-play, vrma-finish.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

>
